content:
- Completed task 05 execution from NOW EXECUTE: implemented typed DCS key parsing/errors, trust evaluation, local member projection, store trait + watch refresh + member-write ownership, and DCS worker step/run integration with pginfo subscription + trust publishing.
- Added focused tests across dcs/keys, dcs/state, dcs/store, dcs/worker and updated worker contract tests for expanded DcsWorkerCtx/store wiring. Introduced serde_json dependency and serde derives needed for typed member record encoding/decoding.
- All required gates now pass (`make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint`). Hit one transient linker rcgu object miss during a chained make run; rerunning sequential gate fixed it (matches known workspace behavior).
- Bookkeeping done: task 05 marked done with `<passes>true</passes>` and `<passing>true</passing>`, task switched via `.ralph/task_switch.sh`, AGENTS learning bullets appended.
- Next immediate step after this entry: stage everything (including `.ralph` changes) and commit with required message format for task 05 completion.

- Read prior progress memory and scanned .ralph/current_tasks.md.
- Applied selection rules: unfinished tasks exist, so they take precedence over meta-task; followed priority ordering and story-chain guidance.
- Chose first unblocked ultra_high task in active chain: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/05a-task-enforce-strict-rust-lints-no-unwrap-expect-panic.md; wrote it to .ralph/current_task.txt, then stopped.

- Read startup progress log and loaded active task from .ralph/current_task.txt (05a strict lint policy task).
- Performed broad parallel repo reconnaissance: Makefile lint wiring, crate root attrs, and exhaustive unwrap/expect/panic/todo/unimplemented inventory.
- Verified current violations are concentrated in test/unit/integration/test-harness code; no obvious non-test runtime unwrap/expect hits surfaced yet.
- Added a full detailed <execution_plan> to task 05a with explicit module checklist, enforcement strategy, verification gates, and completion bookkeeping.
- Appended terminal marker TO BE VERIFIED to the task file and intentionally stopped before implementation, matching requested phase behavior.
- Next step after resume: perform DEEP skeptical verification pass, alter at least one plan item, then switch marker to NOW EXECUTE.

- Picked up task 05a from .ralph/current_task.txt, verified it was at TO BE VERIFIED, and ran a deep skeptical review before execution.
- Updated the execution plan to close a real policy gap: strict denies should not be feature-gated off by test-harness when lint runs with --all-features.
- Executed implementation with minimal code changes: added crate-root runtime clippy denies in src/lib.rs, added narrow test-harness allow scope in src/test_harness/mod.rs, tightened Makefile lint with a dedicated runtime strict pass, and documented lint policy in RUST_SYSTEM_HARNESS_PLAN.md.
- Ran required gates sequentially and all passed: make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint.
- Updated task file checklists/status to done, set <passing>true</passing>, and added a reusable lint-enforcement learning to AGENTS.md.
- Next step is task_switch + commit with required message format, including evidence/challenges in commit body.
